title: Jack's Better Minecraft
description: Have you ever been playing Minecraft and thought, "Wow, this should be in Minecraft!" Well, Jack's Better Minecraft strives to add everything that should be in vanilla Minecraft, but sadly isn't.
body:
Have you ever been playing Minecraft and thought, "Wow, this should be in Minecraft!" Well, Jack's Better Minecraft strives to add everything that should be in vanilla Minecraft, but sadly isn't. This includes stuff from new Super Foods to the new strongest material in the game; Enderanium.

This mod currently adds: 
-Emerald Armor And Tools (Armor And Tools Made From Emeralds That Sit In The Tier Between Iron And Diamond)

-Enderanium Armor And Tools (New Ore You Find In The Outer End Islands That's Better Than Netherite)

-Shulker Shell Chestplate (Chestplate You Can Make Out Of Shulker Shell's That's Slightly Better Than Netherite But Worse Than Enderanium)

-Super Foods (New Craftable Food Sources That Give You Buff's Depending On Which One You Eat)

-New Prehistoric Oasis Biome (A Desert Like Biome With Above Ground Fossils Scattered Around)

-New Beast Fossil Structure (A Fossil Found Above Ground That Belonged To One Colossal Beast)

More Stuff Coming Soon In Future Updates.             Current Version: 1.0.0

Made By: Jack Payne      Made With: MCreator
